labels: ['enhancement', 'feature-request', 'needs-evaluation', 'community']
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Feature Category

Please select the category that best describes your feature request:

- [ ] 🎓 **Educational Enhancement** - Features that improve learning experience or concept demonstration
- [ ] 🌐 **Endpoint Addition** - New HTTP endpoints that demonstrate additional Node.js concepts
- [ ] 🧪 **Testing Improvement** - Enhanced testing capabilities, coverage, or educational testing examples
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation Enhancement** - Improved documentation, tutorials, or learning resources
- [ ] 🔒 **Security Feature** - Security enhancements that demonstrate security best practices
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance Optimization** - Performance improvements with educational value
- [ ] 🛠️ **Development Tools** - Development utilities or tools that aid learning
- [ ] 📊 **Monitoring Addition** - Monitoring or observability features for educational purposes

## 📝 Feature Summary

**Clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to request:**

<!-- 
Provide a brief summary of the feature request. For example:
• 'Add /api/time endpoint that returns current server time in JSON format'
• 'Implement request logging middleware with educational comments'
• 'Create interactive tutorial with step-by-step HTTP server building'
• 'Add health check endpoint for demonstrating monitoring concepts'
• 'Include performance monitoring dashboard for learning resource utilization'

Focus on how this feature enhances the educational value of the tutorial.
-->

## ✅ Zero Dependencies Compliance

Please confirm that your proposed feature aligns with the zero external dependencies philosophy:

- [ ] ✅ Feature uses only Node.js built-in modules (http, fs, path, crypto, etc.)
- [ ] ✅ No external npm packages or third-party libraries required
- [ ] ✅ Implementation relies on native Node.js capabilities and APIs
- [ ] ✅ Educational value focuses on core Node.js concepts and built-in functionality
- [ ] ✅ Any development tools are clearly separated from production code

**Specify which Node.js built-in modules your feature would utilize:**

### Primary Modules

- **http** - [How it would be used for HTTP server functionality]
- **fs** - [If file system operations are needed]
- **path** - [If path manipulation is required]
- **crypto** - [If cryptographic functions are needed]
- **util** - [If utility functions are required]

### Educational Demonstration
<!-- How does using these modules enhance learning about Node.js capabilities? -->

### Compatibility
**Node.js version requirements:**
- [ ] Node.js 18.x
- [ ] Node.js 20.x  
- [ ] Node.js 22.x

## 🎯 Target Learning Level

What skill level is primarily targeted by this feature?

- [ ] **Beginner** - New to Node.js and HTTP server concepts
- [ ] **Intermediate** - Familiar with Node.js basics, learning advanced concepts
- [ ] **Advanced** - Experienced developers learning specific patterns or optimizations
- [ ] **All Levels** - Benefits learners across all skill levels

## 🔨 Implementation Complexity

Estimate the implementation complexity of this feature:

- [ ] **Low** - Simple addition, minimal code changes, clear implementation path
- [ ] **Medium** - Moderate complexity, some architectural considerations, well-defined scope
- [ ] **High** - Complex implementation, significant architectural changes, multiple components affected
- [ ] **Very High** - Major feature requiring extensive changes, multiple development phases

## 🔍 For Maintainers - Feature Evaluation Framework

<!-- This section is auto-populated for maintainer reference -->

### Educational Value Assessment
- **Learning Outcomes**: Does this feature teach new Node.js concepts or HTTP server principles?
- **Skill Development**: What practical skills does this feature help learners develop?
- **Pedagogical Effectiveness**: How does this fit into the overall tutorial learning progression?

### Technical Feasibility Assessment  
- **Zero Dependencies Compliance**: Does this maintain the zero external dependencies requirement?
- **Architecture Alignment**: Does this integrate cleanly with existing application architecture?
- **Performance Impact**: How does this affect server performance and resource usage?

### Community Impact Evaluation
- **Educational Community Benefits**: How does this benefit educators and instructional use cases?
- **Developer Community Contribution**: What demonstration value does this provide for Node.js best practices?
- **Long-term Sustainability**: How does this support future tutorial enhancements and evolution?

### Quality Gates Integration
- **CI/CD Compatibility**: Does this integrate with existing CI/CD quality gates?
- **Test Coverage Requirements**: Does this meet or exceed 95% test coverage requirements?
- **Security Compliance**: How does this maintain security best practices and compliance?

---

**🎓 Thank you for contributing to the Node.js learning community! 🎓**

*This feature request will be evaluated based on educational value, technical feasibility, zero-dependency compliance, and community impact. All features must maintain the tutorial's focus on Node.js built-in capabilities and educational effectiveness.*
